title: E2E, documentation and acceptance
goal: Verify the module skills and admin runtime skill authoring flows end-to-end and update user/operator documentation.
requirements: Add or update e2e coverage for opening a workorder through sidebar chat.
Add or update e2e coverage for opening a waiting-list entry through sidebar chat.
Cover the follow-up phrase case: 'открой ее в правом сайдбаре'.
Cover an unavailable object with safe failure behavior.
Cover admin runtime skill creation or provide an integration test if full UI e2e is out of scope.
Cover permission denial for runtime skill creation by a non-admin user.
Update AI sidebar guide with module skills behavior.
Add operator guide for runtime skill creation, validation, reload and rollback.
Record executor report and acceptance after implementation.
acceptance: E2E verifies the main user flow without relying on the removed hard-coded shortcut.
Documentation explains how a new module registers an AI skill.
Documentation explains how an administrator creates a runtime skill and when discovery registers it.
Workflow reports document implementation result and residual risks.
PROJECT_STRUCTURE.yaml is regenerated after structural changes.
verification: .venv/bin/python manage.py test apps.core.tests apps.ai.tests apps.workorders.tests apps.waiting_list.tests
